WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        th.transaction_id,
        th.transaction_date,
        th.result_code::text AS result_code,
        th.transaction_category
    FROM raw_bale th
    WHERE
        th.transaction_state IN ('1','9','8')
        AND th.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + INTERVAL '7 hour')
                                    AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + INTERVAL '7 hour')
        AND th.transaction_category = ANY(ARRAY[
            'ACTIVATE_DORMANT','BILLPAYMENT_BANK_LOAN','BILLPAYMENT_BPJS_KESEHATAN',
            'BILLPAYMENT_BPJS_TENAGA_KERJA','BILLPAYMENT_CREDIT_CARD',
            'BILLPAYMENT_CREDIT_CARD_OTHER','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_ACT',
            'BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_BAZNAS','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_DOMPET',
            'BILLPAYMENT_ECOM_BUKALAPAK','BILLPAYMENT_ECOM_TOKOPEDIA',
            'BILLPAYMENT_EDUCATION','BILLPAYMENT_INSURANCE',
            'BILLPAYMENT_INTERNET_TV','BILLPAYMENT_MPN','BILLPAYMENT_MULTIBILLER',
            'BILLPAYMENT_MULTIBILLER_LEGAL','BILLPAYMENT_NON_PBB',
            'BILLPAYMENT_OTHER_LOAN','BILLPAYMENT_PBB','BILLPAYMENT_PDAM',
            'BILLPAYMENT_PEGADAIAN','BILLPAYMENT_PGN','BILLPAYMENT_PHONE',
            'BILLPAYMENT_PLN','BILLPAYMENT_TICKET_TRAIN',
            'BILLPAYMENT_TRANSPORTATION','BILLPAYMENT_VA',
            'BILLPAYMENT_VA_MORTGAGE','BILLPAYMENT_VEHICLE_TAX',
            'BUY_MUTUAL_FUND','BUY_SBN','CARDLESS_DEPOSIT',
            'CARDLESS_WITHDRAWAL','EDEPOSITO_PLACEMENT','FREEZE_PROXY_BIFAST',
            'MONEY_CHANGER','PORTING_PROXY_BIFAST','PURCHASE_EVOUCHER_MTIX',
            'PURCHASE_EVOUCHER_STREAMING','PURCHASE_NFC_EMONEY',
            'PURCHASE_NFC_FLAZZ','PURCHASE_NFC_TAPCASH','PURCHASE_PHONE',
            'PURCHASE_PLN_PREPAID','PURCHASE_TOPUP_DANA','PURCHASE_TOPUP_GOPAY',
            'PURCHASE_TOPUP_ISAKU','PURCHASE_TOPUP_LINKAJA',
            'PURCHASE_TOPUP_OVO','PURCHASE_TOPUP_POSPAY',
            'PURCHASE_TOPUP_SHOPEEPAY','QR_CROSS_BORDER','QR_MPM',
            'REGISTRATION_PROXY_BIFAST','SELL_MUTUAL_FUND',
            'SWITCH_FROM_MUTUAL_FUND','SWITCH_TO_MUTUAL_FUND','TRANSFER_ALL',
            'TRANSFER_BIFAST','TRANSFER_FOREX_OA','TRANSFER_FOREX_ON_US',
            'TRANSFER_OA','TRANSFER_OFF_US','TRANSFER_ON_US','TRANSFER_RTGS',
            'TRANSFER_SKN','TRANSFER_SPLIT_BILL','TRANSFER_SWIFT',
            'UNFREEZE_PROXY_BIFAST','UNREGISTRATION_PROXY_BIFAST',
            'UPDATE_PROXY_BIFAST'
        ])
),
base_enriched AS (
    SELECT
        b.transaction_id,
        b.transaction_date,
        dc.error_type,
        b.result_code
    FROM base b
    LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
        ON b.result_code = dc.rc       
        AND b.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi
        AND dc.id_app_identifier = 1
),
Jumlah AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) AS total_transaksi
    FROM base_enriched
),
Persentase AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN b.error_type = 'Sukses'
          OR b.result_code IS NULL
          OR b.result_code = ''
          OR b.error_type = 'N'
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 
      END
    )::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.transaction_id), 0) * 100 AS success_rate
    FROM base_enriched b
),
Rata AS (
    SELECT AVG(per_second) AS "TPS"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('second', transaction_date - INTERVAL '7 hour') AS time,
            COUNT(*) AS per_second
        FROM base_enriched
        WHERE transaction_date >= ($__timeTo()::timestamp)   
        GROUP BY 1
    ) tps_sub
)
SELECT
    j.total_transaksi,
    r."TPS",
    p.success_rate
FROM Jumlah j
CROSS JOIN Rata r
CROSS JOIN Persentase p;

SELECT date_trunc('minute', th.transaction_date  - interval '7 hour') AS time,
COUNT(th.transaction_id) AS total_transaksi,
  SUM(CASE
    WHEN dc.error_type = 'Sukses' OR th.result_code IS NULL OR th.result_code = '' OR dc.error_type = 'N'
    THEN 1 ELSE 0
  END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT th.transaction_id), 0) * 100 AS success_rate
FROM raw_bale th
LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
  ON th.result_code = dc.rc
  AND th.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi
  AND dc.id_app_identifier = 1
WHERE th.transaction_state IN ('1','9','8')
  AND th.transaction_category = ANY(ARRAY['ACTIVATE_DORMANT','BILLPAYMENT_BANK_LOAN','BILLPAYMENT_BPJS_KESEHATAN','BILLPAYMENT_BPJS_TENAGA_KERJA','BILLPAYMENT_CREDIT_CARD','BILLPAYMENT_CREDIT_CARD_OTHER','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_ACT','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_BAZNAS','BILLPAYMENT_DONATION_DOMPET','BILLPAYMENT_ECOM_BUKALAPAK','BILLPAYMENT_ECOM_TOKOPEDIA','BILLPAYMENT_EDUCATION','BILLPAYMENT_INSURANCE','BILLPAYMENT_INTERNET_TV','BILLPAYMENT_MPN','BILLPAYMENT_MULTIBILLER','BILLPAYMENT_MULTIBILLER_LEGAL','BILLPAYMENT_NON_PBB','BILLPAYMENT_OTHER_LOAN','BILLPAYMENT_PBB','BILLPAYMENT_PDAM','BILLPAYMENT_PEGADAIAN','BILLPAYMENT_PGN','BILLPAYMENT_PHONE','BILLPAYMENT_PLN','BILLPAYMENT_TICKET_TRAIN','BILLPAYMENT_TRANSPORTATION','BILLPAYMENT_VA','BILLPAYMENT_VA_MORTGAGE','BILLPAYMENT_VEHICLE_TAX','BUY_MUTUAL_FUND','BUY_SBN','CARDLESS_DEPOSIT','CARDLESS_WITHDRAWAL','EDEPOSITO_PLACEMENT','FREEZE_PROXY_BIFAST','MONEY_CHANGER','PORTING_PROXY_BIFAST','PURCHASE_EVOUCHER_MTIX','PURCHASE_EVOUCHER_STREAMING','PURCHASE_NFC_EMONEY','PURCHASE_NFC_FLAZZ','PURCHASE_NFC_TAPCASH','PURCHASE_PHONE','PURCHASE_PLN_PREPAID','PURCHASE_TOPUP_DANA','PURCHASE_TOPUP_GOPAY','PURCHASE_TOPUP_ISAKU','PURCHASE_TOPUP_LINKAJA','PURCHASE_TOPUP_OVO','PURCHASE_TOPUP_POSPAY','PURCHASE_TOPUP_SHOPEEPAY','QR_CROSS_BORDER','QR_MPM','REGISTRATION_PROXY_BIFAST','SELL_MUTUAL_FUND','SWITCH_FROM_MUTUAL_FUND','SWITCH_TO_MUTUAL_FUND','TRANSFER_ALL','TRANSFER_BIFAST','TRANSFER_FOREX_OA','TRANSFER_FOREX_ON_US','TRANSFER_OA','TRANSFER_OFF_US','TRANSFER_ON_US','TRANSFER_RTGS','TRANSFER_SKN','TRANSFER_SPLIT_BILL','TRANSFER_SWIFT','UNFREEZE_PROXY_BIFAST','UNREGISTRATION_PROXY_BIFAST','UPDATE_PROXY_BIFAST'])
  AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    th.transaction_id,
    th.transaction_date,
    th.result_code,
    th.transaction_category
  FROM raw_bale_bisnis th
  WHERE th.transaction_state IN ('0','1','2','3','4')
        AND th.transaction_status IN ('0','1','2','3','4')
        AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') 
        AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
),

Persentase AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', b.transaction_date - interval '7 hour') AS time,
    SUM(
      CASE 
        WHEN dc.error_type = 'Sukses' OR b.result_code IS NULL OR b.result_code = ''
          OR dc.error_type = 'N'
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 
      END
    )::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.transaction_id), 0) * 100 AS success_rate
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc 
    ON b.result_code = dc.rc AND b.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi AND dc.id_app_identifier = 2
  GROUP BY 1
),

Jumlah AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) AS total_transaksi
  FROM base
),

Rata AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('second', th.transaction_date - interval '7 hour') as time,
  count(*) AS ratarata
FROM base th
WHERE
  th.transaction_date >= $__timeTo() :: date - interval '7 hour'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1 DESC
)

SELECT 
  j.total_transaksi,
  AVG(r.ratarata) AS "TPS",
  AVG(p.success_rate) AS "Success Rate"
FROM Rata r
CROSS JOIN Jumlah j
CROSS JOIN Persentase p
GROUP BY j.total_transaksi

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t.transaction_category,
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.transaction_id) AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            th.transaction_date,
            th.transaction_id,
            th.transaction_category,
            th.result_code,
            dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
        FROM raw_bale_bisnis th
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON th.result_code = dc.rc
            AND th.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 2
        WHERE th.transaction_state IN ('0','1','2','3','4')
          AND th.transaction_status IN ('0','1','2','3','4')
          AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
          AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t.transaction_category,
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code
)

SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', sr.transaction_date - interval '7 hour')
      - (extract(minute from sr.transaction_date - interval '7 hour')::int % 60) * interval '1 minute' AS time,
    SUM(sr.total_transaksi) AS total_transaksi,
    (
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN sr.status_transaksi IN ('Sukses', 'N')
            THEN sr.total_transaksi
            ELSE 0
        END)::numeric
        /
        NULLIF(SUM(sr.total_transaksi), 0)
    ) * 100 AS "Persentase Sukses"
FROM data2 sr
WHERE sr.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  AND sr.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

WITH edc AS (
    SELECT
        TO_TIMESTAMP(
            SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
            LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1), 6, '0'),
            'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
        ) AS transaction_date,
        tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
        tr."TRSTAN",
        dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
    FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
    LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
        ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
        AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
    WHERE
        tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
        AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
),
Jumlah AS (
    SELECT COUNT("TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM edc
    WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamp AND $__timeTo()::timestamp
),
Rata AS (
    SELECT AVG(daily_count) AS "TPS"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('second', transaction_date - INTERVAL '7 hour') AS time,
            COUNT("TRSTAN") AS daily_count
        FROM edc
        WHERE transaction_date >= $__timeTo()::date - INTERVAL '7 hour'
        GROUP BY 1
    ) sub
),
Persentase AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN status_transaksi IN ('Sukses', 'N') 
                  OR result_code IS NULL 
                  OR result_code = '' 
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 
            END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT("TRSTAN"), 0) * 100
        ) OVER () AS "Success Rate"
    FROM edc
    WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamp AND $__timeTo()::timestamp
    GROUP BY date_trunc('minute', transaction_date - INTERVAL '7 hour')
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    j.total_transaksi,
    r."TPS",
    p."Success Rate"
FROM Jumlah j
CROSS JOIN Rata r
CROSS JOIN Persentase p;

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT 
    date_trunc('minute', sr.transaction_date )

    SUM(sr.total_transaksi) AS total_transaksi,

            COUNT("TRSTAN") AS daily_count
        FROM edc

                THEN 1 ELSE 0

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",

        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 6
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" IN ('21')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 6
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",

        t.result_code,

SELECT 
    date_trunc('minute', sr.transaction_date) 
  - (extract(minute from sr.transaction_date)::int % 3) * interval '1 minute' AS time,
    SUM(sr.total_transaksi) AS total_transaksi,
    (
        SUM(CASE

-- JOIN app_identifier ai
--   ON bl.id_app_identifier = ai.id
WHERE $__timeFilter(sr.transaction_date)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING("TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING("TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS') - interval '7 hour')::timestamp AS time,
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" 
      WHERE 
        "TRTRTY" = '21' AND "TRPCCD" = 59
      GROUP BY 1
)     

SELECT * FROM data 
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING("TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING("TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS') - interval '7 hour')::timestamp AS time
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" 
      WHERE 
        "TRTRTY" = '21' AND "TRPCCD" = 59
      GROUP BY 1
)     

SELECT date_trunc('second', time) as time, COUNT(*) FROM data 
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS') - interval '7 hour')::timestamp AS time, 
      COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type, 
      itm."TRTDAT", itm."TRTTIM",
      itm."TRRSPC",
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'Sukses') AS sukses,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'N') AS bisnis
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59  
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)     

SELECT 
   (SUM(sukses) + SUM(bisnis)) / SUM(jumlah)
FROM data 
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)

WITH data AS (
SELECT (TO_TIMESTAMP(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTDAT"::text, 2) || 
    LPAD(SUBSTRING(itm."TRTTIM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
      'YYMMDDHH24MISS') - interval '7 hour')::timestamp AS time, 
      COALESCE(rc.error_type::text, 'NA') AS error_type, 
      itm."TRTDAT", itm."TRTTIM",
      itm."TRRSPC",
      COUNT(*) AS jumlah,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'Sukses') AS sukses,
      COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE rc.error_type = 'N') AS bisnis
      FROM "itm_db_ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" itm LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary rc ON  itm."TRRSPC" = rc.rc AND rc.id_app_identifier = 6
      WHERE itm."TRTRTY" = '21' AND itm."TRPCCD" = 59  
      GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)     

SELECT 
    date_trunc('minute', time) as time_trunc,
    SUM(jumlah) AS "Jumlah Transaksi",
   (SUM(sukses) + SUM(bisnis)) / SUM(jumlah) AS "Success Rate"
FROM data 
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) 
GROUP BY 1

ORDER BY 1;

  SUM(th.transaction_amount) FILTER(WHERE (dc.error_type IN ('N') OR ((th.result_code IS NULL OR th.result_code = '')))) AS "Volume Bisnis",
  SUM(th.transaction_amount) FILTER(WHERE (dc.error_type IN ('S') OR ((th.result_code IS NULL OR th.result_code = '')))) AS "Volume Sistem",
  COUNT(DISTINCT th.transaction_id) FILTER(WHERE (dc.error_type IN ('Sukses') OR ((th.result_code IS NULL OR th.result_code = '')))) AS "Jumlah Sukses",

  SUM(CASE WHEN dc.error_type = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Gagal Sistem"
FROM raw_bale_bisnis th

  ON th.result_code = dc.rc AND th.transaction_category = dc.jenis_transaksi AND dc.id_app_identifier = 2

  AND th.transaction_date >= ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND th.transaction_date <= ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

WITH data2 AS (

        t.transaction_date,

        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc

  SELECT CONCAT(th.result_code, ' > ', th."TRTRTY") AS nama_error,
    th.result_code, th."TRTRTY",
    SUM(th.total_transaksi) AS total_count
  FROM data2 th
  WHERE th.error_type = 'S'
    AND th.transaction_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamp AND $__timeTo()::timestamp
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
  ORDER BY 4 DESC

    rb.transaction_date::timestamp(0) AS transaction_date,
    rb."TRSTAN", rb."TRRRF#", t.total_count,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.nama_error ORDER BY rb.transaction_date DESC) AS rnk

  JOIN top_errors t
    ON rb.result_code = t.result_code
    AND rb."TRTRTY" = t."TRTRTY"
  WHERE rb.transaction_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamp AND $__timeTo()::timestamp

        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r

         LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
